summary: Transaction Search Page testing completed successfully. 26/26 backend tests passed. Fixed Select.Item empty value error in filters panel. All frontend features working: search, results with tier badges, chain panel with steps/provenance/confidence, filters (node type, vendor, confidence), depth slider, cross-links from Dashboard graph widget and Document Detail graph panel.

minor.issue: min_confidence parameter is accepted but only filters edges in chain retrieval, not search results

critical_code_review_comments: Search router correctly implements 4-tier matching: exact → normalized → likely → fuzzy
Chain BFS traversal correctly respects max_depth (1-5) and returns ordered chain steps
All edges include provenance and confidence for transparency
Cross-links properly navigate with URL query parameters
Frontend properly updates URL with ?q= parameter on search
seed_data_creation: Used existing graph data: 179 nodes, 151 edges from 60 bulk-ingested documents. Test references: PO12345, 12345 (invoice), INV-99999, 110743 (BOL)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transaction Search page at /transaction-search is fully functional. 3 API endpoints: GET /api/transaction-search (main search), GET /api/transaction-search/node/{node_id}/chain (node chain), GET /api/transaction-search/document/{doc_id}/chain (document chain). Cross-links work from Dashboard Vendor Intelligence tab graph widget and Document Detail Transaction Graph panel. Filter empty value bug was fixed by changing NODE_TYPES[0].value from '' to 'all'.

Transaction Search APIs.GET /api/transaction-search?q=PO12345: PASS - Returns exact match with tier labels

TransactionSearchPage (/transaction-sear.Filters panel: PASS - Node type, vendor, confidence slider, clear button
TransactionSearchPage (/transaction-sear.Chain panel: PASS - Shows node count, edge count, doc count

Select.Item empty value fix.issue: Radix UI Select.Item requires non-empty value prop, but NODE_TYPES[0] had value: ''
Select.Item empty value fix.fix: Changed NODE_TYPES[0].value from '' to 'all', updated filter logic to treat 'all' as no filter

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real with live graph data
